authority.note: Capability map is a proposal. target_state values are research recommendations, not approvals.

temporal_contract_schema.affected_date_window: explicit date range the build covers (e.g. fecha_visita >= 2026-05-11), never inferred from latest raw
temporal_contract_schema.raw_batch_set: per-source batch ids participating, acknowledging accumulative/mixed snapshots
temporal_contract_schema.route_snapshot_id: the ruta_batch/version effective for the build (e.g. 16/17 for week 2026-06-01), not simply latest
temporal_contract_schema.daily_fact_staged: the staged daily surface used to build weekly, never recomputed from raw at weekly time

capabilities.name: temporal_window_resolution
business_rules: The build only covers the declared window; dates outside it are excluded even if present in latest raw snapshots.
outputs: a bounded set of in-window evidence rows

temporal_contract.evidence: B0: filtering fecha_visita >= 2026-05-11 removed all 13470 extra keys

capabilities.current_coupling: Implicit and undeclared; the surplus proved the window is not currently a first-class input.
capabilities.risk: Without it, accumulative raw is treated as incremental and inflates the daily fact (13469-row surplus).

capabilities.name: raw_batch_selection
business_rules: Select the batch set per source that the build declares; latest-per-source is the current default but is accumulative/mixed and must be bounded by the window.
outputs: the raw rows participating in a build

temporal_contract.evidence: B0 H1: latest selector chooses KPIONE 19, KPIONE2 38, POWER_APP 26 exactly once each

capabilities.current_coupling: Latest-batch selection works correctly per source, but batches are accumulative so batch selection alone does not bound dates.
capabilities.risk: Misread as incremental when it is accumulative; pairs with window to avoid surplus.

capabilities.name: route_snapshot_versioning
business_rules: A build must use the route snapshot that was effective for the productive materialization, not simply the latest-week snapshot.
outputs: route attributes (cod_rt, cliente, persona, local) for in-window evidence

temporal_contract.evidence: B0 H9: week 2026-06-01 baseline matches ruta_batch 16/17, local used 18; route16 dedup reduced value diffs 1227 -> 56

capabilities.current_coupling: v2 frequency base reads ruta_rutero_load_rows (live dependency); snapshot choice currently implicit.
extraction_prerequisites: H0.3 route policy decided by Bastian
capabilities.risk: Latest route snapshot diverges from the snapshot effective at materialization time, producing the 56 residual value differences.

capabilities.name: source_precedence
business_rules: KPIONE2 first, then POWER_APP same-day fallback, KPIONE1 audit-only; unique day key [semana_inicio, fecha_visita, cod_rt, cliente_norm].
outputs: one resolved evidence row per day key with the winning source

temporal_contract.evidence: CONTROL_GESTION_IMPLEMENTATION_KERNEL precedence rules; B0 daily key fecha_visita+cod_rt+cliente_norm

capabilities.current_coupling: Precedence encoded inside v2 views; not a versioned input.
extraction_prerequisites: precedence declared as versioned rule set
tests_required: precedence resolution test per day key
capabilities.risk: Implicit precedence makes the build non-deterministic across source-set changes.

capabilities.name: daily_fact_builder
business_rules: Daily key fecha_visita+cod_rt+cliente_norm is unique (0 duplicates); the precedence view plus mart timestamp defines the productive daily fact.
outputs: staged daily fact (21,348 baseline rows for the current window)
capabilities.current_coupling: Daily fact is built by the incremental refresh; the staged daily is the contract surface for weekly.
tests_required: exact daily parity on declared window
capabilities.risk: If built from raw without window/precedence/route contracts, it inflates and diverges.

capabilities.name: weekly_fact_builder
business_rules: Weekly must be built from the staged daily/route surface; it must not recompute event_scope from raw at weekly time.
outputs: weekly out fact and materialized view (baseline 20,138 rows)

temporal_contract.evidence: B0 weekly TIMEOUT because the view re-enters raw/WindowAgg/Sort/HashJoin before week filter

capabilities.current_coupling: v_cg_out_weekly_v2 recomputes from raw/event_scope, causing the 900s timeout; the productive refresh stages daily first.
extraction_prerequisites: H0.4 weekly built from staged daily
capabilities.risk: Recomputing weekly from raw is non-reproducible and non-performant (timeout).

capabilities.name: parity_and_reconstruction
business_rules: Reconstruction is valid only when daily and weekly reproduce baseline exactly under the declared contracts; raw is classified necesario/reconstruible/historico.
outputs: parity verdicts, diff classification, reconstructability proof

temporal_contract.evidence: B0 confirmed reproducibility requires explicit contracts

capabilities.current_coupling: Lives in evidence + Codex labs; not yet a codified capability.
capabilities.risk: Without it, no storage cleanup, retention, or payload_json decision is safe.

capabilities.name: laboratory_reproducibility
business_rules: Docker/local_pg is a reproducible lab, not a backup; rebuildable from git + evidence manifests.
outputs: local PostgreSQL parity environment
hash-verified baselines

temporal_contract.evidence: B0 reused 9C7A3/9C7A4 evidence with 0 hash mismatches

capabilities.current_coupling: local_pg container preserved; must remain rebuildable rather than relied upon as storage.
capabilities.risk: Treating local_pg as a backup violates principle 5 and creates a hidden source of truth.

capabilities.name: inventory_ingestion
business_rules: Drop NO_RT rows; dedupe in Python; UPSERT on (fecha, cod_rt, sku, marca); normalize SKU and cod_rt.
outputs: public.fact_stock_venta

declares: fecha as the only record date

capabilities.current_coupling: Standalone loader; independent of Control Gestion (principle 3).
capabilities.risk: Stale Excel formula values ingested silently (COD_RT).

capabilities.name: inventory_derivation_offload
business_rules: COD_RT via CADENA+N_LOCAL+MARCA; NOMBRE_LOCAL_RR via COD_RT; OTROS via FOCO_CLIENTE; duplicados redundant.
outputs: derived columns proven by read-only parity (Program A)

declares: use same-workbook RUTA_RUTERO to avoid temporal mismatch

capabilities.current_coupling: Currently computed in Excel; candidate to move to Python after parity.
capabilities.risk: Excel coercion/duplicate-key semantics diverge from Python.

capabilities.name: route_master_ingestion
business_rules: UPSERT on (source, source_row); row_hash is an analysis fingerprint, NOT the key; writes current table plus full load history and batch metadata.
outputs: public.ruta_rutero
cg_core.ruta_rutero_load_rows
cg_core.ruta_rutero_load_batch
capabilities.current_coupling: Shared between Inventory selectors and Control Gestion route resolution; the load history is a live CG dependency.
capabilities.risk: Accumulating load history without retention policy; row_hash utility unproven.

capabilities.name: cg_raw_ingestion_kpione2_adapter
business_rules: Sheet SHA256 hash-skip; batch_registry metadata; payload_json preserves source fields including KPIONE2 SP Item ID (physical NULL).
outputs: cg_raw.kpione_raw
cg_raw.kpione2_raw
cg_raw.power_app_raw
cg_audit.batch_registry

temporal_contract.evidence: C001 LOADER-FACT-002 VALIDATED; H6 SP Item ID payload-only CONFIRMED

capabilities.current_coupling: KPIONE2 is a Control Gestion source adapter (principle 4); hard-wired in the v17 loader and v2 views.
capabilities.risk: payload_json cannot be removed (C001 R08 REJECTED); SP Item ID exists only there for KPIONE2.

capabilities.name: inventory_read_api
business_rules: Read-only query/selector layer with cache TTLs for stock and cliente flows.
outputs: dataframes for reposicion and cliente screens
capabilities.current_coupling: Concentrated in the 5,348-line app/db.py alongside Control Gestion read paths.
tests_required: read-path smoke for reposicion and cliente
capabilities.risk: Domain entanglement with CG inside db.py.

capabilities.name: cg_read_api
business_rules: v2 normal path; B3 legacy fallback when USE_CG_V2!=1 or on uncaught v2 exception; B3 stays present.
outputs: CG dataframes and KPIs for the screen

declares: reads built facts under declared build_version

capabilities.current_coupling: v2 and B3 both in db.py/control_gestion.py; B3 fallback currently silent.
extraction_prerequisites: C002 Program C B3 observability (do not remove B3)
capabilities.risk: Silent B3 fallback; entanglement with Inventory in db.py.

capabilities.name: presentation_streamlit
business_rules: Streamlit dispatch of CLIENTE, CONTROL GESTION, LOCAL, MERCADERISTA; deferred imports inside main().
outputs: rendered UI and exports
capabilities.current_coupling: Streamlit-bound today; future modules must not depend mandatorily on it (principle 7).
extraction_prerequisites: H4 headless capability layer so Streamlit becomes one consumer
capabilities.risk: Hard Streamlit coupling blocks reuse if not behind a headless layer.

capabilities.name: readonly_extraction
inputs: allowlisted DB objects under read-only role
business_rules: No free-form SQL; mutation tokens blocked; read-only transaction enforced; DSN redaction.
outputs: catalog, dependency graph, DDL, baselines for the lab
capabilities.current_coupling: Committed tool; the safe DB knowledge bus into the lab.

non_authority_notice: Capability target_state values are research recommendations. No extraction, refactor, or deletion is authorized.
